//: Audit U-31: pre-fix this file didn't exist. `tsc --noEmit` with no tsconfig + no source-file args prints the help text and exits successfully — the build script silently passed every CI run. That's how the missing safeErrorDetail import in agents.ts (audit U-30) reached production. The minimal config below makes tsc actually compile the src/ tree and surface missing identifiers like 'safeErrorDetail' without enabling the wider strict-mode rules that flag unrelated Cloudflare-D1 generic-call ambiguities. The narrower scope is intentional — we want the missing-import gate, not a full TS-strict migration.
